faqs.question: What ant species are most common in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Morris Heights residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, carpenter ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in older Morris Heights buildings as they can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to ensure the most effective treatment approach for your infestation.
